scenario: Checkpoint decision after CoreHID runtime entitlement block and no USB bridge availability.
blocking_notes: Decision recorded: ad-hoc, self-signed, and named local signing did not satisfy the restricted CoreHID virtual HID entitlement on normal macOS; no USB bridge is available; selected route is local-development-only HIDDriverKit/system-extension fallback exploration with no paid subscription requirement for the current lab path. No DESK-03 or DESK-06 production support is claimed until later proof rows pass. Actual SIP, developer mode, system extension install, activation, removal, rollback, reboot, or OS security-state changes require explicit later approval.
